headline: Competitive Positioning Matrix Complete — ReportEase vs. 10 Competitors Analyzed
highlights: Comprehensive competitive matrix: Feature set, pricing, ease of use, integration breadth scoring
10 competitors analyzed: Whatagraph, Supermetrics, Tableau, Looker, Google Data Studio, Dash, Klipboard, Ruler Analytics, DashThis, Report Garden
Three core differentiators identified: (1) Built for agency workflows, (2) Fastest time-to-first-report (2 hrs), (3) Lowest TCO ($1,200/user/yr)
Sustainable competitive advantage defined — defensible through template library data moat and high switching costs
Sales enablement: 7 detailed battle cards covering objection handling for each major competitor
Messaging framework: Three-tier positioning ladder with audience-specific messaging (End User, CMO, IT, Competitor Switcher)
GTM impact: Improves Messaging Readiness from 1/10 → 5-6/10; foundation for all positioning and marketing work
Cost comparison quantified: ReportEase 60% cheaper than per-connector models (Supermetrics, Whatagraph) for typical 5-user, 3-source agency
Three deliverables committed to GitHub: Positioning matrix (26KB), Advantage definition (31KB), Battle cards (21KB)

next_actions.label: Validate messaging with beta customers
next_actions.task_template: Land 3-5 early customers; A/B test three positioning statements; measure which message drives fastest adoption

next_actions.label: Create sales collateral
next_actions.task_template: Build ROI calculator, competitive comparison one-pagers, and case study templates for sales team

next_actions.label: Update landing page with competitive positioning
next_actions.task_template: Refresh homepage and value prop section with validated messaging; improve GTM Messaging Readiness from 5 → 8/10
